<!-- Describe your game in 2-3 sentences -->


### How to Play
<!-- Explain how to run and play your game -->


### Screenshots / Demo
<!-- If it's a web game, add a screenshot. For CLI games, paste sample output -->


### What I Learned
<!-- Share what you learned while building this game -->


---

### Submission Checklist

- [ ] My game is in the correct folder: `games/<category>/my-game-name/`
- [ ] I included a `README.md` with description, instructions, and what I learned
- [ ] I included a `metadata.json` with correct fields
- [ ] My game is **original** or significantly modified from any tutorial
- [ ] My game does **NOT** make external API calls or network requests
- [ ] My game does **NOT** access the file system outside its directory
- [ ] My submission has **max 5 files** and **max 500 lines** of code
- [ ] I only used allowed file types: `.py`, `.js`, `.html`, `.css`, `.json`, `.md`, `.txt`
- [ ] My code is readable, well-commented, and not obfuscated
- [ ] I have tested my game locally and it works

### Confirmation

- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] I understand my submission will be reviewed before merging

---

> 💡 **Tip:** Community members can vote on your game using 👍 reactions!  
> Top-voted games get featured on the weekly leaderboard!
